rationale: R2: SHELL_METACHAR_RE changed from /[\x60;|&\n]|\$\(/ to /[\x60;|&\n$]/, a strict superset (\$( always contains $) — verified monotone, no removed coverage. Node-executed matrix confirms $HOME/${x}/$x/$(cmd)/backtick/;/|/&/newline all rejected; plain slugs/targets pass. All buildCommand values (slug, spec, target, bead_id) route through validateShellSafe via validateArgs(args), called once at workflow entry before any buildCommand call; round is integer-typed (Number.isInteger gate), immune to string injection; mix[].family never reaches buildCommand. .claude/workflows/ms-panel.js mirror confirmed byte-identical via cmp and via git diff (identical hunks in both files). No bypass path found. Aggregate coverage: R1 has TestSanitizeNonBeadDecision covering every decision leg (2,3,4,5,5b,6,8,9,10) plus 5 more non-bead-specific tests; R3 has 4 cmd-layer tests (stamps-per-gate, invalid-rejected-before-write, omitted-byte-identical, advisory-read-through) plus internal/panel's TestCreate_StampsGate and TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues (all 5 enum values + empty); R4's TestLoad_EmptyStringModel covers both resolve-to-family and neither-set-refused in one test. go test ./cmd/mindspec ./internal/panel ./internal/config ./plugins/mindspec all green. Minor gap: R2's JS behavior is pinned only by a Go string-literal-match test (no committed node-executed assertion), but this matches the repo's pre-existing convention (no package.json/JS test runner exists at all; TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet uses the same style) — not a regression, not blocking.
findings: R2 fix is monotone (strict character-class superset of the prior regex) and closes bare-$/${x}/$x expansion; confirmed via git diff and a manual node-executed positive/negative matrix.

Every value passed to buildCommand (slug, spec, target, bead_id) is validated by validateShellSafe (directly or via validateBeadId/validateTarget) inside validateArgs(args), called once at line 455 before any buildCommand invocation at lines 465/518/532 — no bypass path.
.claude/workflows/ms-panel.js and plugins/mindspec/workflows/ms-panel.js are byte-identical (cmp verified) and the git diff shows identical hunks in both files.
R1 (TestSanitizeNonBeadDecision) has a test row for every documented PanelGateDecision leg (2,3,4,5,5b,6,8,9,10) confirming no bead/<empty> or RawMergeFence("") leak in the sanitized message.

R3 gate stamp/reject/inert/byte-identical are each independently tested (cmd/mindspec: 4 tests; internal/panel: TestCreate_StampsGate + TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues covering all 5 enum values).
R4's single new test (TestLoad_EmptyStringModel) has subtests for both the resolve-to-family case and the still-refused neither-set case.

Minor non-blocking observation: the R2 SHELL_METACHAR_RE behavioral change is pinned in-repo only via a Go string-match test (TestMsPanelWorkflow_ShellMetacharRejectsBareDollar), not an executable node-run assertion; this is consistent with the repo's existing pattern (no JS test runner present at all) rather than a new gap introduced by this fix.
